title: Odisha: Bhubaneswar mein bhakti sammelan ke dauran vyakti ki hatya se sansani
content: Bhubaneswar ke ek bhakti sammelan ke dauran kal raat ek vyakti ki hatya hone se shehar mein dar ka mahaul ban gaya. Ghatna tab hui jab do samoohon ke beech vivad badh gaya aur dekhte hi dekhte haathapai ne hinsa ka roop le liya. Police ne turant sthiti ko control kiya aur kuch logon ko hirasat mein liya hai. Prarambhik jaanch mein vyaktigat dushmani ka angle saamne aa raha hai. Is ghatna ke baad suraksha badha di gayi hai aur aas-paas ke ilakon mein police tainat kar di gayi hai. Prashasan ne logon se shanti banaye rakhne ki appeal ki hai aur kisi bhi afwah par dhyan na dene ko kaha hai.

title: Cuttack district mein school students ke liye naya digital learning program shuru
content: Cuttack district ke kai government schools mein aaj se ek naya digital learning program shuru kiya gaya hai. Is program ke tahat students ko tablets aur smart content ke through padhaya jayega. Officials ke mutabik isse rural area ke students ko bhi modern education ka labh milega. Teachers ko bhi training di gayi hai jisse wo digital tools ka sahi istemal kar saken. Students aur parents ne is initiative ka swagat kiya hai aur ummeed jatayi hai ki isse padhai aur aasaan aur interesting hogi. Yeh project agle kuch mahino mein aur districts tak badhaya jayega.

title: India mein competitive exams ke dates announced, students mein tayari tez
content: Desh bhar mein aane wale kuch mahino mein hone wale major competitive exams ke dates announce ho chuke hain. Isme engineering, medical aur government job exams shamil hain. Students ab apni tayari ko aur tez kar rahe hain. Coaching institutes aur online platforms par bhi activity badh gayi hai. Experts ka kehna hai ki students ko ab revision aur mock tests par focus karna chahiye. Stress management bhi bahut zaroori hai, isliye regular breaks aur healthy routine maintain karna chahiye. Parents ko bhi students ko emotional support dene ki salah di gayi hai.

title: Delhi mein mahila suraksha ko lekar bada kadam, night patrol badhaya gaya
content: Delhi police ne mahila suraksha ko dhyan mein rakhte hue raat ke samay patroling ko aur mazboot karne ka faisla liya hai. Iske tahat sensitive areas mein extra police force tainat ki jayegi. Helpline numbers ko bhi active kiya gaya hai jisse emergency mein turant madad mil sake. Authorities ne kaha hai ki safety unki priority hai aur kisi bhi ghatna ko rokne ke liye proactive steps liye ja rahe hain. Logon se bhi appeal ki gayi hai ki kisi bhi suspicious activity ki turant jankari police ko dein.

title: Tech world mein AI tools ka use badha, students ke liye naye opportunities
content: Aaj ke samay mein artificial intelligence tools ka istemal tezi se badh raha hai. Students ke liye yeh ek bada opportunity ban raha hai. Coding, content creation aur research jaise fields mein AI ka use unki productivity badha raha hai. Experts ka kehna hai ki students ko AI ko sirf shortcut ke roop mein nahi balki ek learning tool ke roop mein use karna chahiye. Future jobs mein AI knowledge ka bahut importance hoga. Isliye abhi se is field mein skills develop karna faydemand rahega.

title: Mumbai mein ajeeb ghatna: bina driver ke chalti dikhi car, log hairaan
content: Mumbai ke ek busy area mein log tab hairaan reh gaye jab ek car bina driver ke chalti hui dikhi. Baad mein pata chala ki car mein technical glitch ke kaaran yeh ghatna hui. Car ko turant rok liya gaya aur kisi ko chot nahi aayi. Is ghatna ka video social media par viral ho gaya hai. Experts ne kaha hai ki modern vehicles mein automation features ke saath safety checks bahut zaroori hote hain. Is tarah ki ghatnaon se sabak lekar future mein aur strict safety measures lagu kiye jayenge.
